mutations.name: addProjectV2DraftIssue
mutations.description: Creates a new draft issue and add it to a Project.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: projectItem
returnFields.description: The draft issue added to the project.

mutations.name: addProjectV2ItemById
mutations.description: Links an existing content instance to a Project.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: item
returnFields.description: The item added to the project.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: item
returnFields.description: The item archived from the project.

mutations.name: clearProjectV2ItemFieldValue
mutations.description: This mutation clears the value of a field for an item in a Project. Currently only text, number, date, assignees, labels, single-select, iteration and milestone fields are supported.

returnFields.name: clientMutationId
returnFields.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

returnFields.name: projectV2Item
returnFields.description: The updated item.

mutations.name: convertProjectV2DraftIssueItemToIssue

mutations.description: This mutation updates the value of a field for an item in a Project. Currently only single-select, text, number, date, and iteration fields are supported.

objects.name: AddedToProjectV2Event

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the AddedToProjectV2Event object.

fields.name: project
fields.description: Project referenced by event.

fields.name: wasAutomated

arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

enums.name: ProjectV2FieldOrderField

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order project v2 fields by creation time.

enums.name: ProjectV2ItemFieldValueOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which project v2 item field value connections can be ordered.

values.name: POSITION
values.description: Order project v2 item field values by the their position in the project.

enums.name: ProjectV2ItemOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which project v2 item connections can be ordered.

values.name: POSITION
values.description: Order project v2 items by the their position in the project.

enums.name: ProjectV2OrderField
enums.description: Properties by which projects can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: The project's date and time of creation.

values.name: UPDATED_AT
values.description: The project's date and time of update.

enums.name: ProjectV2PermissionLevel
enums.description: The possible roles of a collaborator on a project.

values.name: ADMIN
values.description: The collaborator can view, edit, and maange the settings of the project.

values.name: WRITE
values.description: The collaborator can view and edit the project.

enums.name: ProjectV2Roles
enums.description: The possible roles of a collaborator on a project.

values.name: ADMIN
values.description: The collaborator can view, edit, and maange the settings of the project.

values.name: NONE
values.description: The collaborator has no direct access to the project.

values.name: WRITER
values.description: The collaborator can view and edit the project.

enums.name: ProjectV2SingleSelectFieldOptionColor
enums.description: The display color of a single-select field option.

enums.name: ProjectV2State
enums.description: The possible states of a project v2.

values.name: CLOSED
values.description: A project v2 that has been closed.

values.name: OPEN
values.description: A project v2 that is still open.

enums.name: ProjectV2StatusUpdateOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which project v2 status updates can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Allows chronological ordering of project v2 status updates.

enums.name: ProjectV2StatusUpdateStatus
enums.description: The possible statuses of a project v2.

values.name: AT_RISK
values.description: A project v2 that is at risk and encountering some challenges.

values.name: OFF_TRACK
values.description: A project v2 that is off track and needs attention.

values.name: ON_TRACK
values.description: A project v2 that is on track with no risks.
